items.how_used: 使用密度依赖（Logistic）模型预测麋鹿种群动态，基于初始种群、内禀增长率、环境容纳量等参数。
items.source_excerpt: Density-Dependent (Logistic) Model ... P(t) = K / (1 + ((K - P0)/P0) * e^{-rt})

items.how_used: 基于最小生存面积和竞争者占用面积计算环境容纳量，公式为 K = (A - C) / a，其中 A 为总面积，C 为竞争者占用面积，a 为每头麋鹿所需最小面积。

variables.C: 本地竞争者占用的面积（英亩）
variables.a: 每头麋鹿所需的最小面积（英亩/头）

items.source_excerpt: Carrying Capacity Equation ... K = (A - C) / a

items.how_used: 列出5条关键假设并给出理由，包括忽略迁移、个体差异、种群周期等，简化模型。
items.source_excerpt: Assumptions/Justifications ... Assumption 1 - The Eastern United States is defined as the Appalachian Mountains and eastward ... Assumption 2 - The geographical regions we introduce these elk have enough resources ...

items.how_used: 使用实际数据（2001-2011年GSMNP麋鹿种群数据）验证模型，计算出生率和死亡率，评估模型准确性。
items.source_excerpt: We then tested our model with legitimate research data on the previously recorded elk population dynamics in GSMNP over a 10 year period (2001-2011). Using this data and our own analysis we were able to establish birth and death rates for the introduced elk population and thus project the future survivability and sustainability of this population.

items.how_used: 引言部分介绍背景（欧洲殖民导致麋鹿灭绝）、问题（重新引入Manitoba麋鹿的可行性）和论文目标。
items.source_excerpt: Introduction ... North America was once home to one of the most diverse ecosystems ... In this paper we address the plausibility of sustaining the Manitoban elk in the Great Smoky Mountain National Park through a mathematical model of population growth and sustainability.

items.how_used: 论文采用IMRaD结构：摘要、引言、假设、模型、结果、结论、参考文献，符合竞赛论文规范。
items.source_excerpt: Table of Contents ... 1. Introduction ... 2. Interpretation/Problem Restatement ... 3. Assumptions/Justifications ... 4. Mathematical Models Pt. 1 ... 5. Mathematical Models Pt. 2 ... 6. Mathematical Models Pt. 3 ... 7. Conclusion ... 8. Works Cited
